query: SELECT s.id, s.subject, s.fromEmail, s.receivedAt, sa.decision, sa.confidence, sa.summary FROM signals s LEFT JOIN signal_analyses sa ON s.id = sa.signalId ORDER BY s.receivedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 43pHZH57f8CsvmH.root --database cSHx67NTiqWRWuwYCEpu4V --execute SELECT s.id, s.subject, s.fromEmail, s.receivedAt, sa.decision, sa.confidence, sa.summary FROM signals s LEFT JOIN signal_analyses sa ON s.id = sa.signalId ORDER BY s.receivedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
